invoke /eval-run iter-N

--baseline iter-(N-1)
check fixed / regressions

div.div:
Handle Regressions
assess severity
minor: keep, net positive
major: revert, try reframe
stuck: report to user

- name
passed: bool

rationale
judge_type

comment
